quote: Do you want to know who you are? Don't ask. Act! Action will delineate and define you. – Thomas Jefferson
fact: Leonardo Da Vinci invented the scissors, the helicopter, and many other present day items.
tip: Use keyboard shortcuts to save time.
joke: Shout out to my grandma, that's the only way she can hear.
